title: PI AGENT FULL COURSE: Master Pi Agent in 30 Minutes
summary: David Ondrej offers a 30-minute course on Pi Agent for building real coding agents. The content covers fundamentals of using Pi Agent and includes promotions for related services including Supabase, a Skool community for AI coding, and Scale Software hiring.
writeup: This David Ondrej video is a 30-minute course on Pi Agent for building real coding agents, walking through the fundamentals of the tool. It matters for anyone evaluating Pi Agent as a way to construct functional agents rather than demos. The video also includes promotions for related services: Supabase, a Skool community focused on AI coding, and Scale Software hiring.
